task_completion.description: Verify that Euro (EUR) and British Pound Sterling (GBP) currencies have been added/enabled in the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Drupal Commerce Currencies configuration page showing 'Euro' and 'British Pound Sterling' in the list of available currencies.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Urban Electronics' store is configured to support EUR and GBP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Store edit page for 'Urban Electronics' showing Euro and British Pound Sterling selected in the supported or available currencies list.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'European Travel Adapter' product is created with the correct SKU and is published.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Products list or product edit page showing the title 'European Travel Adapter', the SKU 'EU-TRAVEL-ADAPT', and a status indicating it is 'Published' or active.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'European Travel Adapter' has a price of exactly 24.99 EUR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the product variations page, product edit page, or product list showing the price as '24.99' and the currency as 'EUR' or '€' for the European Travel Adapter.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'British Audio Cable' product is created with the correct SKU and is published.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Products list or product edit page showing the title 'British Audio Cable', the SKU 'UK-AUDIO-CBL', and a status indicating it is 'Published' or active.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'British Audio Cable' has a price of exactly 12.99 GBP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the product variations page, product edit page, or product list showing the price as '12.99' and the currency as 'GBP' or '£' for the British Audio Cable.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Drupal web interface to configure the store and products.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the Drupal admin UI, rather than terminal windows executing drush commands or database queries.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Drupal Commerce application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should display the standard Drupal admin toolbar, commerce menus, and proper page structures, not a text editor or a mock HTML file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use scripts to bypass manual configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent writing or executing custom PHP or SQL scripts in a terminal or code editor to insert the products or currencies.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target store is 'Urban Electronics' (Store ID 1). The required currencies to add are EUR (Euro) and GBP (British Pound Sterling). Product 1 must be exactly titled 'European Travel Adapter' with SKU 'EU-TRAVEL-ADAPT', priced at 24.99 EUR. Product 2 must be exactly titled 'British Audio Cable' with SKU 'UK-AUDIO-CBL', priced at 12.99 GBP. Both products must be published.
